ant_baby.Name: Formiga Beb
ant_baby.Description: Fraca e indefesa, mas possui grandes sonhos.

ant_egg.Name: Ovo de Formiga
ant_egg.Description: Not yet an ant but perhaps soon.

ant_hole.Name: Formigueiro
ant_hole.Description: Ants go in, and come out. Can't explain that.

ant_queen.Name: Formiga Rainha
ant_queen.Description: You must have done something really bad if she's chasing you.

ant_soldier.Name: Formiga Soldado
ant_soldier.Description: It's got wings and it's ready to use them.

ant_worker.Name: Formiga Oper
ant_worker.Description: It's a bit temperamental, probably from working all the time.

barrel.Name: Barrel
barrel.Description: Under no circumstances let this thing spill.<n/>We cannot risk another mutant insect this month.

beetle.Name: Besouro
beetle.Description: It's hungry and flowers are its favorite meal.

beetle_hel.Name: Besouro
beetle_hel.Description: Scourge that spawns in the other plane.

beetle_mummy.Name: Besouro
beetle_mummy.Description: This one seems like it shouldn't be alive...

beetle_nazar.Name: Besouro
beetle_nazar.Description: This one has a different pattern... what does that mean?

beetle_pharaoh.Name: Besouro
beetle_pharaoh.Description: That thing on its head looks valuable... We should steal it.

centipede.Name: Centipede
centipede.Description: It's just there doing its thing.

centipede_body.Name: Centipede
centipede_body.Description: It's just there doing its thing.

centipede_hel.Name: Centipede
centipede_hel.Description: Scourge that spawns in the other plane.

centipede_hel_body.Name: Centipede
centipede_hel_body.Description: Scourge that spawns in the other plane.

dummy.Name: Boneco de Teste
dummy.Description: How do you have this in your gallery?

fire_ant_egg.Name: Ovo de Formiga de Fogo
fire_ant_egg.Description: This ant is not yet on fire.

firefly_magic.Name: Vagalume
firefly_magic.Description: There's something magical about this one.

ghost.Name: Fantasma
ghost.Description: A tormented soul, freeing it is the best you can do for it.

hornet.Name: Hornet
hornet.Description: These aren't quite as nice as the little bees.

ladybug_dark.Name: Joaninha
ladybug_dark.Description: Cute and harmless... if left unprovoked.

leafbug.Name: Bicho-Folha
leafbug.Description: It's not a leaf, but it is a bug.

leafbug_shiny.Name: Bicho-Folha
leafbug_shiny.Description: This one has a special color to it...

mantis.Name: Louva-a-Deus
mantis.Description: You better pray you don't become dinner.

mecha_flower.Name: Mecha Flower
mecha_flower.Description: Someone has been making these mechanical flowers... What could this mean?

roach.Name: Barata
roach.Description: Gotta go FAST... until they get tired.

rock.Name: Pedra
rock.Description: A rock. It doesn't do much.

silverfish.Name: Silverfish
silverfish.Description: Those annoying little things that eat clothes.<n/>It also loves garbage.

spider_hel.Name: Spider
spider_hel.Description: Scourge that spawns in the other plane.

termite_baby.Name: Baby Termite
termite_baby.Description: Fraco e indefeso, mas possui grandes sonhos.<n/>Essas criaturas parecem de algum jeito estar conectadas.

termite_egg.Name: Ovo de Cupim
termite_egg.Description: Not yet a termite but perhaps soon.

termite_mound.Name: Termite Mound
termite_mound.Description: Termites go in, and come out. Can't explain that.

termite_soldier.Name: Soldier Termite
termite_soldier.Description: It's got wings and it's ready to use them.<n/>These creatures appear to be connected somehow.

termite_worker.Name: Worker Termite
termite_worker.Description: It's a bit temperamental, probably from working all the time.<n/>These creatures appear to be connected somehow.

tomb.Name: Tumba
tomb.Description: Huh, what could be in here?

wasp_hel.Name: Wasp
wasp_hel.Description: Scourge that spawns in the other plane.

worm.Name: Minhoca
worm.Description: It's supposed to eat dirt but this one's eating flowers.

worm_guts.Name: Worm guts
worm_guts.Description: You're not supposed to see this text. I'm calling the police.
